LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING WITH ADDITIONAL LANGUAGE TO THE ORDER. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION AND SUSTAINED WITH 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR FULL DETAILS) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-06-2020 IN 206, PLAINTIFF DON DONFRAY'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL TRIAL SETTING WAS HEARD. APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY DEENA ZACHARIN, ESQ. LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, OCT-19-2020 HEARING HELD RE: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT INSTRUCTS THE PARTIES TO FILE SIMULTANEOUS, SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFING NO LONGER THAN FIVE PAGES IN LENGTH BY OCTOBER 26, 2020. THE BRIEFING IS TO ADDRESS: 1.) ANY ADDITIONAL AUTHORITY INCLUDING ANY OUT-OF-STATE AUTHORITY ON ANALOGOUS FACTS, AND 2.) WHAT ADDITIONAL FACTS AND ALLEGATIONS PLAINTIFF COULD MAKE IN GOOD FAITH WERE THE COURT TO SUSTAIN THE PRESENT DEMURRER AND GRANT PLAINTIFF LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT WILL TAKE THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION ON OCTOBER 26, 2020. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)

DEMURRER to 2ND Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-29-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DEENA K. ZACHARIN, Esq. of Stebner and Associates (Tel: 415-362-9800) for Plaintiff;
Atty. ADAM A. VUKOVIC, Esq. of Severson & Werson (Tel: 415-398-3344) for Defendant Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Matter argued. The Court instructs the parties to file simultaneous, supplemental briefing no longer than five pages in length by October 26, 2020. The briefing is to address: 1.) any additional authority including any out-of-state authority on analogous facts, and 2.) what additional facts and allegations plaintiff could make in good faith were the court to sustain the present demurrer and grant plaintiff leave to amend. The Court will take the matter under submission on October 26, 2020.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances (all through Court Call):
Deena Zacharin, Esq. 415-362-9800 of Stebner & Associates for Plaintiff Don Dofray.
Adam Vukovic, Esq. 415-398-3344 of Severson & Werson, APC for Defendant Wells Fargo Bank.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant argues. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling with additional language to the order.

Defendant's demurrer is overruled as to the first and third causes of action and sustained with 20 days leave to amend as to the second cause of action. (see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for full details)
